sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the right index finger, rated 7 out of 10, and reports pain in the hand. He denies any other injuries. The patient reports chronic constipation. The patient takes miralax.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is within normal limits. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are most consistent with hand pain and constipation.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor will put a splint on the right finger. A splint will be applied to the finger. The doctor will prescribe mobic. The patient will take 15 milligrams of mobic once a day. The doctor wants the patient to return in two weeks. The patient will return for follow-up in two weeks. , : , : , :
